zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Parr於大約1406年10月7日出生在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾時，他的父親John Parr Esq.24歲，母親Agnes Crophull36歲。他於1420年與Alice Tunstall在英國英格蘭藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年12月4日之前在英國維斯特莫藍德，埋葬在英國維斯特莫藍德肯達爾。

nameMeanings.name: Parr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Parr in Lancashire, or from residence at an enclosure (Middle English parr, Old English pearr).
German: from Middle Low German parre ‘parish, district, minister's house’; a metonymic occupational name for a parson or for someone who worked in a parsonage or manse. Compare Pfarr .
English: variant of Pear with the common late Middle English and early modern English change of -er- to -ar-.

variants.name: Pare
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Henri, Laurent, Normand, Fernand, Alphonse, Clermont, Elphege, Alain, Benoit, Gaston, Girard.
French (Paré): occupational name for someone who finished cloth, from the past participle of parer ‘to prepare’.

variants.name: Parman
meanings: Americanized form of German Parmann: variant of Parr .
Possibly an altered form of German Bärmann (see Barmann ).

variants.name: Porr
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ulrike, Gunther.
metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of leeks or other vegetables, from Middle High German porre, pforre ‘leek’ (from Latin porrum).

variants.name: Pfarr
meanings: South German: from Middle High German pfarr ‘district, parish’ or pfarre(r) ‘parish priest’, hence an occupational name for a parson, or a topographic name for someone who lived near the parsonage.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Parr was born about 7 October 1406, in Kendal, Westmorland, England, his father, John Parr Esq., was 24 and his mother, Agnes Crophull, was 36. He married Alice Tunstall in 1420, in Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died before 4 December 1461, in Westmorland, England, and was buried in Kendal, Westmorland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Parr est né environ 7 octobre 1406, à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, John Parr Esq., avait 24 ans et sa mère, Agnes Crophull, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alice Tunstall en 1420, à Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé avant 4 décembre 1461, à Westmorland, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Kendal, Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Parr um 7. Oktober 1406 in Kendal, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Parr Esq. 24 und seine Mutter Agnes Crophull 36. Er hat 1420 in Thurland Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Alice Tunstall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb vor 4. Dezember 1461 in Westmorland, England und wurde in Kendal, Westmorland, England begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Tunstall nel 1420, nel Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Parrが約1406年10月7日にイギリスウエストモーランドケンダルで生まれた時，父John Parr Esq.は24歳，母Agnes Crophullは36歳であった。1420年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアスウルランド カストルでAlice Tunstallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年12月4日以前にイギリスウエストモーランドで死去し，イギリスウエストモーランドケンダルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Parr(이)가 대략 1406년 10월 7일 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Parr Esq.(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Crophull(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스를랜드 카스틀에서 Alice Tunstall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 12월 4일 이전 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 사망했으며 영국 웨스트모를랜드 켄다에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Parr nasceu aproximadamente 7 de outubro de 1406, em Kendal, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Parr Esq., tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Crophull, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Tunstall em 1420, em Thurland Castle, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Parr родился около 7 октября 1406 г. в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени John Parr Esq. было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Crophull, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Tunstall в 1420 г. в местности турланд кастл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер перед 4 декабрь 1461 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия и был похоронен в местности кендаль, вестморланд, Англия.
